faqs.answer:
Global Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.Pharma Candidate must have passed 10+2 examination with Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics / Biotechnology / Biology and obtained the above mentioned marks (40% marks in case of candidate belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.
M.Pharma Admission through counseling will be offered first to GPAT qualified candidates, and if seats remain vacant candidates qualifying the entrance examination of the University UKSEE 2022 (In order of merit) will be offered.
D.Pharma Candidate passed 12th/equivalent with Physics, Chemistry & Biology / Mathematics subjects from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.title: College is very good and also campus teachers and all are very good except lab conditions.

content.Placements: I don't know the percentage of placements. The highest package is 2.5 LPA, and the lowest salary don't know. Recruiting companies are L&T, Tata, and many local companies are there. All students got internships the previous year at Tata and Cummins. Top roles offered are diploma trainee and engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and labs are in good condition. We do not get Wi-Fi. Hostel facility is also very good but food is not too good. Also, conduct sports every year. Medical kits are there if anyone is injured.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful and highly qualified. They are very knowledgeable, Teaching quality is also very excellent. It makes you do a job in your own field. Semester exams are a little bit difficult in our college. If we study hard then it's not difficult for us. Faculty members of our college are very good.

Hostel provides food for hostelers and food is excellent in the college canteen. If someone is injured by anything then they will probably provide first aid kits. Every year, they will conduct annual sports like cricket, running, long jump, high jump, etc.
